results.title: Twitter's quietly killing our startup. ...
results.content:
has been banned without any explanation—and this, after we’ve paid over $10,000 in Business Premium fees to the platform! As the CEO of NicNames.com, I’m honestly stunned by the lack of transparency and support from X. To make matters worse, a representative told us we’d need to pay an additional $20,000+ just to reclaim our username “NicNames”, even though we legally own the trademark. We’ve been loyal users and big believers in X as the “best platform for AI companies,” despite my personal disagreements with some of Elon Musk’s political views. But this situation has left us disappointed and frustrated. For those unfamiliar, NicNames.com is more than just a domain registrar. We’re pioneers in Web3 domains, the first ICANN-accredited registrar to automate Ethereum (.eth) domains, and we [...] Image 18: No alternative text description for this image

results.title: ‎X - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content: I’ve had X (TWITTER) since the start but rarely used it the 1st many years. I had primarily stuck with FB, sometimes posted pictures on IG. But the last several years I was finding FB was not showing me my friends or pages I followed and I wasn’t finding news as easily. I started checking twitter more and more but it was also unfollowing accounts constantly and I realized you had to be careful of what you said or you would be blocked. I was always needing to re find the people I was following and my feed was full of accounts I didn’t follow and posts on subjects I didn’t like or want to see. And I was seeing non stop porn accounts in replies to every tweet, in my DMs etc. But then Elon said he was trying to by it and things started to change. After he took over, it was like a whole new [...] birth of Stan Twitter is what truly ruined Twitter people are worshipping the worst people and taking down people who don’t deserve it. I have only been banned once for 12 hours and it was a slap in the face that I need to go back to reality and not in the horrid world of this. Tiktok is definitely 100 times worse but Twitter is just the adult version of that. I would say only 10 percent of Twitter is actual cute content and you have to make sure it’s on your fyp and the rest is either corn or argument bait that will get people in the comments and raise money from them watching advertisements. I am very grateful to Elon Musk for ruining their little ugly brain rot den I hope he drives Twitter to the ground becuase I know if they replicated Twitter behavior they would be called out for the [...] I will talk about the reason for the deterioration of Twitter The first thing that is most important in it is the global trend has been removed, the feature of the call does not work for many people and the best solution is to delete this feature also The problem of the phrase "Are you to me" I hate this phrase I only put a few tweets and sometimes I became I avoid putting it because of this phrase a month ago my account stopped and I cannot restore it because of the phrase are you to me knowing that I did not do any activity I do not post a lot because of my fear of restricting my account and after that until I recover my account I have to make a call and this feature does not work also something annoying on Twitter It is a modification feature, where by God be upon you. When does this
